subcodes.first_line: O My solace! Draw nigh and ascend, that thine eyes may be gladdened by My Beauty. O My sister! Soar unto the melodies of the Spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قرتی هلمی و تعالی لتقر عیناک بجمالی ان یا اختی تصاعدی الی نغمات الروح
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @living waters; water of life, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
